text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While thinking over our training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Let's go! I'm here to train till I drop!
choice_data_list: But it's not time for training yet.
But it's not time for training yet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, you're right. But I think we can get
started anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's strange seeing Seiun Sky take her training this
seriously since she's usually the type to slack off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What's up? You're making a funny face.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aha, I got it. You figured I was gonna skip again,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, too bad. Yep, I just couldn't come up with a
good plan for playing hooky today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Might be 'cause I'm feeling all sluggish. The ideas just weren't coming. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's too exhausted to come up with a plan to
skip training, it might be time to adjust her
schedule so she can have a break.
